title: More Menu
heading: Courts
text:
# Courts

Tripura High Court
The Tripura High Court is the High Court of the state of Tripura. It was established on 23 March 2013, after making suitable amendments in the Constitution of India and North-Eastern Areas Act, 1971. Wikipedia
Address: New Capital Complex, Agartala, Tripura 799010
Established: 26 March 2013
Seat: Agartala
District and Session Judge: West Tripura District
District and Session Judge, West Tripura District located at Agartala court complex.
